prompt: Our fintech startup in São Paulo processes customers health insurance data and credit scores. We want to use this data for marketing personalised financial products. Is this allowed under LGPD? What legal bases and safeguards apply?
assertions: Correctly classifies health insurance data as sensitive personal data under Art. 5, II requiring Art. 11 basis
States that legitimate interest is prohibited for sensitive data processing
Identifies express specific consent (Art. 11, I) as the only viable basis for marketing use of health data
Addresses credit scores as regular personal data with broader Art. 7 bases available
Recommends RIPD/DPIA (Art. 38) and mentions non-discrimination principle (Art. 6, IX)
